list_note: The 'task' filter list (flagtab.h:25-29 AUDIT_FILTER_TASK) matches at task-creation (fork/clone) and can only see inherited task attributes (auditctl(8)). Narrowed by auid>=1000 it fires for user-task creation only -- LOW / near-zero net volume. Valid, distinct from 'exit'. A naive 'any -a rule is HIGH' classifier over-warns.

rules.note: task-creation list, narrowed by auid. Fires at fork/clone for user tasks; LOW/near-zero net volume. 1200 B/event. Valid distinct list (not 'exit').

rate_band_basis: f3 section 6: task-creation, tightly narrowed by auid => LOW (user-task fork/clone is infrequent vs syscall-level events).
